name: formatCurrency
description: Formats numbers as currency strings using Intl.NumberFormat with locale and currency support.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying monetary values consistently.
Specify currency code (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.) for proper symbol.
Handles decimal places and thousands separators automatically.

params.name: number
params.description: The numeric value to format as currency.

return_value.description: Formatted currency string with symbol and proper separators.

Dont: Don't assume USD for all users
